Class BlockState.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessageLite.Builder
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessage.Builder<BlockState.Builder>
com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.Builder<BlockState.Builder>
com.soulfiremc.grpc.generated.BlockState.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.google.protobuf.Message.Builder, com.google.protobuf.MessageLite.Builder, com.google.protobuf.MessageLiteOrBuilder, com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder, BlockStateOrBuilder, Cloneable
Enclosing class:
BlockState
public static final class BlockState.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.Builder<BlockState.Builder> implements BlockStateOrBuilder
A block observed in the bot's world view, including its type and runtime
property state (e.g. "facing": "north", "waterlogged": "true").
Protobuf type soulfire.v1.BlockState
